browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT Images polling flow. It reuses the authenticated browser session, opens the conversation route, and extracts image URLs from the latest assistant turn.

sequences.description: Open thread -> inspect latest assistant turn -> return image status and URLs.
sequences.name: chatgpt_images_get_latest

steps.name: Open the ChatGPT conversation in the current tab
Allow the thread shell to settle
Wait for the ChatGPT thread surface
Inspect the latest assistant turn for generated images
steps.script: const clean=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const expectedChatId=clean(arg0);const parsedCount=Number.parseInt(clean(arg1),10);const expectedImageCount=Number.isFinite(parsedCount)&&parsedCount>0?parsedCount:2;const normalize=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const visible=(n)=>!!(n&&n instanceof Element&&getComputedStyle(n).visibility!=='hidden'&&getComputedStyle(n).display!=='none'&&n.getBoundingClientRect().width>0&&n.getBoundingClientRect().height>0);const chatId=()=>{const m=window.location.pathname.match(/^\/c\/([^/?#]+)/);return m?m[1]:null;};const strip=(node)=>{const clone=node.cloneNode(true);clone.querySelectorAll('button, nav, form, textarea, input, svg, style, script').forEach((c)=>c.remove());return normalize(clone.textContent||'');};const turns=()=>{const raw=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-message-author-role], main article, [data-testid*='conversation-turn'], [data-testid*='conversationTurn']"));const seen=new Set();const out=[];for(const node of raw){const root=node.closest('[data-message-author-role]')||node;if(seen.has(root)) continue;seen.add(root);const explicit=(root.getAttribute('data-message-author-role')||'').toLowerCase();const testId=(root.getAttribute('data-testid')||'').toLowerCase();const role=explicit||(/assistant|model/.test(testId)?'assistant':/user|prompt/.test(testId)?'user':'unknown');const markdown=root.querySelectorAll('.markdown, [data-message-content], [data-testid*="markdown"], pre, code, p, li');const text=normalize(Array.from(markdown).map((child)=>child.textContent||'').join('\n\n'))||strip(root);if(!text&&role==='unknown') continue;out.push({root,role,text,test_id:root.getAttribute('data-testid')||null});}return out;};const imageUrl=(img)=>{const srcset=String(img.getAttribute('srcset')||'').split(',').map((p)=>p.trim()).filter(Boolean);const srcsetUrl=srcset.length?srcset[srcset.length-1].split(/\s+/)[0]:'';const raw=img.currentSrc||img.src||img.getAttribute('src')||srcsetUrl||'';try{return raw?new URL(raw,window.location.origin).toString():'';}catch{return raw;}};const goodImage=(img)=>{const url=imageUrl(img);if(!url||/^data:/i.test(url)||/avatar|profile|favicon|icon|emoji|spinner|loading/i.test(url)) return false;const width=img.naturalWidth||img.width||img.clientWidth||0;const height=img.naturalHeight||img.height||img.clientHeight||0;const area=width*height;const label=normalize([img.alt||'',img.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',img.getAttribute('title')||''].join(' ')).toLowerCase();if(/avatar|profile|icon|logo/.test(label)) return false;if(area&&area<16384) return false;return true;};const extractImages=(root)=>{if(!root) return [];const out=[];const seen=new Set();for(const img of Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('img'))){if(!(img instanceof HTMLImageElement)||!goodImage(img)) continue;const url=imageUrl(img);if(!url||seen.has(url)) continue;seen.add(url);out.push({url,alt:normalize(img.alt||''),width:img.naturalWidth||img.width||img.clientWidth||0,height:img.naturalHeight||img.height||img.clientHeight||0});}return out;};const currentChatId=chatId();if(expectedChatId&&currentChatId&&currentChatId!==expectedChatId) throw new Error(`expected chat_id ${expectedChatId} but opened ${currentChatId}`);const allTurns=turns();const latestAssistant=[...allTurns].reverse().find((turn)=>turn.role==='assistant')||null;const latestUser=[...allTurns].reverse().find((turn)=>turn.role==='user')||null;const images=extractImages(latestAssistant?.root||null);const streamingControlsPresent=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]')).filter(visible).some((node)=>/stop generating|continue generating|resume|stop creating/i.test(normalize([node.getAttribute('aria-label')||'',node.getAttribute('title')||'',node.textContent||'',node.getAttribute('data-testid')||''].join(' ')).toLowerCase()));const pendingGeneration=/creating|generating|editing/i.test(normalize(latestAssistant?.text||'').toLowerCase())&&images.length<expectedImageCount;const ready=images.length>=expectedImageCount&&!streamingControlsPresent&&!pendingGeneration;const status=ready?'complete':(images.length>0?'partial':((streamingControlsPresent||pendingGeneration)?'pending':'missing'));return {url:window.location.href,title:document.title,chat_id:currentChatId,expected_image_count:expectedImageCount,ready,status,image_count:images.length,images,latest_assistant_response:latestAssistant?{text:latestAssistant.text,test_id:latestAssistant.test_id}:null,latest_user_message:latestUser?{text:latestUser.text,test_id:latestUser.test_id}:null,message_count:allTurns.length,assistant_turn_count:allTurns.filter((turn)=>turn.role==='assistant').length,streaming_controls_present:streamingControlsPresent,pending_generation:pendingGeneration};

description: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id, inspect the latest assistant turn for generated images, and report whether the image set is ready.

parameters.description: Numeric limit used by the workflow.
parameters.name: expected_image_count

help.summary: Open an existing ChatGPT conversation by chat id, inspect the latest assistant turn for generated images, and report whether the image set is ready.

name: ChatGPT Images: Get Latest Result
